posts.text:
I'm actually fine with this: "Journalists have taken to horse-trading among themselves, offering the contact information of other world leaders—or sometimes even dozens of bold-faced names—just to get the most important one saved into their phones."


Ashley Parker (@AshleyRParker)

We were recently approached by another journalist who offered to trade more than two dozen cellphone numbers of significant stature for the one number of most significant stature —Trump’s. (We declined.) W/ @michaels
